channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump’s 100% tariff threat on Taiwan chips raises cost, supply chain fears
item.description: President Donald Trump has suggested plans to impose tariffs of up to 100% on semiconductors imported from Taiwan, aiming to boost US manufacturing but risking higher costs and supply chain disruptions for tech firms and enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 4 tiny Docker images for lightweight containers
item.description: Docker images can get pretty bulky if you’re not careful. Your typical Docker image includes everything you need to run a particular piece of software (such as the application language’s runtime) and everything those things depend on.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Achieving more with less: How Wipro enhances Microsoft 365 Copilot for superior results
item.description: Using generative AI tools as part of a productivity suite isn’t just about doing things better and faster.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Unknown threat actor targeting Juniper routers with backdoor: Report
item.description: Network administrators using routers from Juniper Networks are being urged to scan for possible compromise after the discovery that an unknown threat actor has been installing a backdoor in customer routers since at least 2023.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Stable values API would speed Java startups
item.description: Startup times for Java applications would be improved through a proposed API for stable values, which are objects that hold immutable data.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Pathways to Innovation: VMware Cloud Service Providers Driving Business Outcomes with Private Cloud
item.description: Over the past year, as a part of our larger transformation, we’ve doubled down on our commitment to enhancing our partner ecosystem. Combining their unique strengths to drive impact and scale provides the opportunity to achieve more than we ever could alone.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: INE Security Alert: Expediting CMMC 2.0 Compliance
item.description: INE Security, a leading global provider of cybersecurity training and certifications, today announced a new initiative designed to accelerate compliance with the Department of Defense’s (DoD) newly streamlined Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) 2.0.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: More Powerbeats Pro 2 images have surfaced, and there's a 'Heart Rate' button
item.description: Hot on the heels of rumors that Powerbeats Pro 2 could beat AirPods to the punch for heart-rate monitoring, fresh images have landed – and they look good.
item.dc:creator: becky.scarrott@futurenet.com (Becky Scarrott), TechRadar

item.title: Scalpers are salivating right now - MSI suggests RTX 5090 supply will be tight due to Nvidia's shortage
item.description: It isn't much of a surprise, but the RTX 5090 is expected to have a short supply according to Nvidia's partner, MSI.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: DeepSeek triggers shock waves for AI giants, but the disruption won’t last
item.description: Chinese start-up DeepSeek rocked the tech industry Monday after the company’s new generative AI (genAI) bot hit Apple’s App Store and Google Play Store and downloads almost immediately exceeded those of OpenAI’s ChatGPT.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Futurists' Top Trends for 2025: What Will Stay the Same
item.description: A look at what IT leaders can expect to continue into 2025, including Musk's influence, talent management, technology illiteracy, and IT dissatisfaction among stakeholders.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: At least 11 Baltic cables have been damaged in 15 months, prompting NATO to up its guard
item.description: NATO is deploying eyes in the sky and on the Baltic Sea to protect cables and pipelines that stitch together the nine countries with shores on Baltic waters.
item.dc:creator: John Leicester And Emma Burrows, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What enterprises need to know about DeepSeek’s game-changing R1 AI model
item.description: Two years ago, OpenAI’s ChatGPT launched a new wave of AI disruption that left the tech industry reassessing its future. Now within the space of a week a small Chinese startup called DeepSeek appears to have pulled off a similar coup, this time at OpenAI’s expense.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Businesses get their own version of the Chrome Web Store
item.description: Though there are a variety of cool extensions for the Chrome browser, there are also malicious extensions that pose a security threat. To increase security, Google has now launched the Chrome Web Store for Enterprises, a new store specifically designed for business users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Chris Hayes: Musk changes to X 'massively destructive' to how people see the news
item.description: MSNBC host Chris Hays tore into billionaire Elon Musk and warned against what he characterized as the "massively destructive" effect he is having on the information business. "Oh, it’s just massively destructive.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Its most recent mega-acquisition is its $28 billion purchase of Splunk, a bold move that adds revenue opportunities in observability, data analytics, AIOps, and genAI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 11 cutting-edge programming languages to learn now
item.description: A clean slate. A fresh start. The new broom sweeps clean. The folk sayings are in agreement. Sure, your favorite old programming language is comfortable and easy to use. You know the APIs and libraries backward and forward. But you also know all the glitches, bugs, and failure modes that go with it.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to pick the right SAST tool
item.description: Like pretty much any security tool, picking a SAST (static application security testing) tool isn’t a matter of “What’s the best?” but rather “What’s the best for me?” Whether you already have a tool that needs replacing or you’re starting from greenfield, it’s helpful to understand the market so yo
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Why tech in Congress lags behind the modern world
item.description: On a typical day, you can’t turn on the news without hearing someone say that Congress is broken. The implication is that this dereliction explains why the institution is inert and unresponsive to the American people.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: People are hawking TikTok-loaded phones for thousands on eBay, Facebook
item.description: People are listing phones preloaded with TikTok for tens of thousands of dollars on eBay, Facebook marketplace and other online storefronts — though it is not clear if there are many buyers at those prices. TikTok was briefly unavailable to U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: More questions than answers around Trump’s Stargate AI plans
item.description: In its second day of operation, the Trump administration announced a $500 billion private sector initiative called Stargate intending to build AI infrastructure across the United States and create over 100,000 U.S. jobs. But questions about the project abound. Pres.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cyber Command’s order creates ‘inflection point’ for DoDIN
item.description: Lt. Gen. Paul Stanton, commander of JFHQ-DoDIN, said commanders can better manage risks and focus on defending the applications and data that matters the most. The post Cyber Command’s order creates ‘inflection point’ for DoDIN first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: This flying motorcycle can take you from traffic to sky in minutes
item.description: The Skyrider X1 from Rictor claims to be the "first amphibious flying passenger motorcycle," and it combines land and air travel in one sleek design.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
